title: GOVERNANCE_BOOT Digest Schema
description: GOVSYNC-S102-DIGEST-001 v1.1 EAG-2_LOCKED. Governance Awareness Digest Layer ONLY. NOT a registry replication mechanism.

boot_id.description: Unique identifier for this GOVERNANCE_BOOT artifact.

generated_session.description: Session number at generation time. Dynamic binding — NOT hardcoded.

governance_state.description: Overall governance state at time of digest generation.

registry_digest.description: Registry existence awareness. One entry per registry. Source: VPS canonical registry.

registry_id.description: Registry identifier. Source: VPS canonical registry.

registry_type.description: Registry type classification. Source: Registry Lifecycle Layer.

registry_status.description: Current lifecycle status. Source: Registry Lifecycle Layer.

latest_hash.description: SHA256 hash of registry at VPS canonical. Source: Canonical Hash Layer.

version.description: Registry version string. Source: Registry Metadata Layer.

approval_ref_summary.description: Approval reference summary ONLY. Source: Approval Awareness Layer. FORBIDDEN: approval chain body / decision rationale / voting detail / audit trace.

trust_digest.description: Trust awareness projection. Source: Trust Evaluation Layer.

trust_state.description: Current trust state. Source: Trust Evaluation Layer.

oracle_candidate.description: Whether an ORACLE_CANDIDATE override is pending. Source: ORACLE_CANDIDATE Layer.

trust_transition_ref.description: Trust transition reference summary ONLY. Source: Trust Transition Awareness Layer. FORBIDDEN: forensic detail / full trust analysis / remediation logic.

degraded_source_count.description: Number of degraded sources contributing to trust evaluation. Source: Trust Evaluation Layer.

stale_digest.description: Deterministic stale awareness. Source: Stale Policy Layer.

stale_state.description: Current stale state. Source: Stale Policy Layer.

warning_threshold.description: Session number at which STALE_WARNING triggers. Derived: expiry_session_limit - warning_window(default=2). Source: Stale Transition Layer.

expiry_session_limit.description: Session number at which registry expires. Source: Stale Policy Layer.

stale_trigger.description: Deterministic trigger identifier ONLY. Source: Stale Transition Awareness Layer. FORBIDDEN: arbitrary stale reasoning / subjective escalation.

stale_policy_status.description: Whether stale policy has been formally locked. Source: Policy Governance Layer.

alert_digest.description: Awareness attention signals. Source: Awareness Alert Layer.

alert_id.description: Unique alert identifier. Source: Awareness Alert Layer.

severity.description: Alert severity. Mapped to Fail-Closed Tier: WARNING=T0 / REVIEW=T1 / FAIL=T2+T3. Source: Fail-Closed Tier Layer.

affected_registry.description: Registry ID affected by this alert. Source: Registry Awareness Layer.

trust_state.description: Trust state at time of alert. Source: Trust Awareness Layer.

stale_state.description: Stale state at time of alert. Source: Stale Awareness Layer.

summary_message.description: Lightweight awareness summary ONLY. Source: Awareness Summary Layer. FORBIDDEN: executable remediation / deployment recovery / mutation instruction / registry body detail.

sync_anchor.description: Canonical synchronization awareness. Source: Canonical Hash Layer.

canonical_hash.description: SHA256 reference to canonical governance state. Reference ONLY — FORBIDDEN: registry payload embedding / runtime replication. Source: Canonical Hash Layer.

sync_basis.description: The hash type used as synchronization basis. Source: Sync Policy Layer.

mismatch_flag.description: True if sync_anchor hash does not match expected canonical. Source: Sync Validation Layer.

generated_session.description: Session number when sync_anchor was last computed. Dynamic binding — NOT hardcoded. Source: SESSION_CONTEXT.
